sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on the green bar's red dot at (10, 34)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 10, 'col': 34}])
print("Result:", last_action_result)

# Check current bar lengths
seg = current_frame.segmentation
n_pixels = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
y_pixels = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y')
print(f"Current: N={n_pixels}, Y={y_pixels}")

# Check red dot positions
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'r':
        print(f"r node {n['id']}: boundary={n['boundary']}")

if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('done'):
    print("LEVEL COMPLETED!")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
